title: Virgin Galactic Holdings Third Quarter 2024 Earnings: Beats Expectations
text: Virgin Galactic (NYSE:SPCE) delivered better-than-expected third quarter results. The company reported a net loss of $74.5 million, representing a 29% improvement compared to the prior year's $105 million loss. Per-share losses also improved significantly to $2.67 from $5.57 year-over-year. The aerospace company substantially exceeded analyst forecasts, with revenue surpassing expectations by 48% and earnings per share beating projections by 29%. Management projects robust expansion, with revenues expected to grow at 71% annually over the coming three years—significantly outpacing the broader aerospace and defense sector's anticipated 4% growth rate. Despite strong operational performance, investor sentiment remained cautious. Share prices declined 4.4% during the week following the announcement. The company carries three identified investment warning signs that warrant investor consideration before committing capital.
